title: To Spell Again
body:
**This mod is still being made, please let me know about, your suggestions, bugs, ect. in the discord**
 
_To Spell Again_ has you using the power of elemental gems within minecraft's earth learn to combine these elements to create there uses with their power combined!
 
Will you master every element?
 
Will you fall to the dangers of the world?
 
Or will you rise victorious?
 
Defeat these dangers and learn _To Spell Again_!
 
 
# CONTENT:
 
Combine the main elemental gems in a crafting table! I will let you expirement with that, because otherwise it's really boring. 
 
Use the spell book to bind the gem to DEFUALT:Z
 
![Spell Book Crafting Recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a308b0a9e12608674a233101b5d900ab09037f44.png)
 
  
## Has:
 
Water Gem
 
Fire Gem
 
Steam Gem
 
## Plans:

More elements and combinations.

Custom models.

Better effects.

Armor and Weapons.

Different casting methods.

Enemies and Bosses.
 
 
 
 
### INFO
 
This mod is one of my first! _Join the discord_ to see further updates on all my work!
[https://discord.gg/fAS5ECDt](https://discord.gg/fAS5ECDt)
